members.name: ClearDefaultInputValues
members.summary: Clears the default input ports value.

members.name: GetDefaultInputPort
members.summary: Returns the input port which should be connected by default when this node is created as a result of dragging a connection from an existing node to the empty space on the graph.

members.name: GetDefaultInputValues
members.summary: Returns an [Array] containing default values for all of the input ports of the node in the form [code][index0, value0, index1, value1, ...][/code].

members.name: GetInputPortDefaultValue
members.summary: Returns the default value of the input [param port].

members.name: RemoveInputPortDefaultValue
members.summary: Removes the default value of the input [param port].

members.name: SetDefaultInputValues
members.summary: Sets the default input ports values using an [Array] of the form [code][index0, value0, index1, value1, ...][/code]. For example: [code][0, Vector3(0, 0, 0), 1, Vector3(0, 0, 0)][/code].

members.name: SetInputPortDefaultValue
members.signature: public void SetInputPortDefaultValue(int port, Variant value, Variant prevValue)
members.summary: Sets the default [param value] for the selected input [param port].

members.name: LinkedParentGraphFrame
members.summary: Represents the index of the frame this node is linked to. If set to [code]-1[/code] the node is not linked to any frame.

members.name: OutputPortForPreview
members.summary: Sets the output port index which will be showed for preview. If set to [code]-1[/code] no port will be open for preview.

values.name: PORT_TYPE_BOOLEAN
values.summary: Boolean type. Translated to [code skip-lint]bool[/code] type in shader code.

values.name: PORT_TYPE_MAX
values.summary: Represents the size of the [enum PortType] enum.

values.name: PORT_TYPE_SAMPLER
values.summary: Sampler type. Translated to reference of sampler uniform in shader code. Can only be used for input ports in non-uniform nodes.

values.name: PORT_TYPE_SCALAR
values.summary: Floating-point scalar. Translated to [code skip-lint]float[/code] type in shader code.

values.name: PORT_TYPE_SCALAR_INT
values.summary: Integer scalar. Translated to [code skip-lint]int[/code] type in shader code.

values.name: PORT_TYPE_SCALAR_UINT
values.summary: Unsigned integer scalar. Translated to [code skip-lint]uint[/code] type in shader code.

values.name: PORT_TYPE_TRANSFORM
values.summary: Transform type. Translated to [code skip-lint]mat4[/code] type in shader code.

values.name: PORT_TYPE_VECTOR_2D
values.summary: 2D vector of floating-point values. Translated to [code skip-lint]vec2[/code] type in shader code.

values.name: PORT_TYPE_VECTOR_3D
values.summary: 3D vector of floating-point values. Translated to [code skip-lint]vec3[/code] type in shader code.

values.name: PORT_TYPE_VECTOR_4D
values.summary: 4D vector of floating-point values. Translated to [code skip-lint]vec4[/code] type in shader code.
